name: coTfsDeactivateSyncPdoMonitor
title: coTfsDeactivateSyncPdoMonitor
description: This function switches off the calling of all switched on sync PDO callbacks.
The callbacks can be switched on with coTfsActivateSyncPdoMonitor.

parameters.name: pdoCanId
parameters.description: CAN-ID of the PDO to be monitored.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
